name: LineSegment
summary: The LineSegment class represents a single finite segment of a line in 3D space. See Line for the implementation of a straight line.

constructors.name: LineSegment
constructors.summary: Instantiates a line segment with both the starting point and the end point zeroed.

constructors.name: LineSegment
constructors.summary: Instantiates a line segment with the given points.

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.summary: Returns true if the objects are equal.

methods.name: Equals(ICurve)
methods.summary: Returns true if the other curve is a line segment equal to this

methods.name: GetDirectionVector
methods.summary: Returns a new unit direction vector of a line segment.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Returns a hash code for a line segment. Notice, in extremely rare cases, you might not get the same hash code for two line segments even though they are considered equal! This should, however, happen only in extremely rare cases!

methods.name: Length
methods.summary: Returns the length of a line segment.

properties.name: EndPoint
properties.summary: Gets the end point of the line segment

properties.name: Point1
properties.summary: Gets the start point of the line segment

properties.name: Point2
properties.summary: Gets the end point of the line segment

properties.name: StartPoint
properties.summary: Gets the start point of the line segment
